title: Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Knights of the Old Republic
content:
{{Top|rwm|old|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Knights of the Old Republic}} {{Image|real}} {{ComicCollection |image=[[File:KnightsOfTheOldRepublic.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi –
Knights of the Old Republic'' |writer=[[Tom Veitch]] |penciller=*[[Chris Gossett]] *[[Janine Johnston]] *[[David Roach]] |inker=*[[Mike Barreiro]] *[[Janine Johnston]] *[[David Roach]] |letterer=[[Willie Schubert]] |colorist=[[Pamela Rambo]] |cover artist=[[Hugh Fleming]] |editor=*[[Dan Thorsland]] *[[Brian Gogolin]] |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[August 1]], [[1994]]{{DarkHorse|url=Books/44-164/Star-Wars-Tales-of-the-Jedi---Knights-of-the-Old-Republic-TPB|text=Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi — Knights of the Old Republic trade paperback}} |other date= |media type=Trade paperback |pages=136 |isbn=978-1-56971-020-3 |isbn2= |timeline=[[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]] |series=[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (miniseries)|''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'' miniseries]] |issues=TPB |preceded by=[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire (trade paperback)|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' trade paperback]] |followed by=[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising (trade paperback)|''Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' trade paperback]] }} '''''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Knights of the Old Republic''''' is a graphic novel collecting the five-issue miniseries [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (miniseries)|''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'']]. It was originally released as simply '''''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Collection''''' with the same cover art, except that the words "The Collection" were directly beneath the "Tales of the Jedi" logo, rather than at the bottom of the cover. It also included the covers of each of the initial comics. {{Comics-stub}} ==Publisher's summary== ''Four thousand years before Luke Skywalker stood as the final Jedi, his predecessors wandered the universe, each playing his own role in keeping the peace and holding back the forces of the dark side. This 136-page collection focuses on Ulic Qel-Droma and Nomi Sunrider, two young novices training to become Jedi warriors. Their training, however, turns into a trial by fire when they prematurely have to face off against reigning crimelord Great Bogga, a Hutt who has killed one of the universe's most powerful Jedi Knights.'' ==Contents== *[[Tales of the Jedi 1|''Tales of the Jedi'' 1]] *[[Tales of the Jedi 2|''Tales of the Jedi'' 2]] *[[Tales of the Jedi 3|''Tales of the Jedi'' 3]] *[[Tales of the Jedi 4|''Tales of the Jedi'' 4]] *[[Tales of the Jedi 5|''Tales of the Jedi'' 5]] ==Media== ===Content gallery=== File:KnightsOfTheOldRepublic.jpg|Cover File:TOTJpromotion.png|1994 Promo ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{DarkHorse|url=Books/44-164/Star-Wars-Tales-of-the-Jedi---Knights-of-the-Old-Republic-TPB|text=Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi — Knights of the Old Republic trade paperback}} {{TalesOfTheJediNav}} {{Interlang |de=Das Geheimnis der Jedi-Ritter |it=Cronache Jedi : I Cavalieri della Vecchia Repubblica |ja=スター・ウォーズ：ジェダイ物語 旧共和国の騎士 |ka=ვარსკვლავური ომები: თქმულებები ჯედაებზე – ძველი რესპუბლიკის რაინდები }} [[Category:Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi trade paperbacks|01]]
